description: Fundamentals of real estate finance and investment. Qualitative and quantitative characteristics of commercial real estate. Developing and analyzing commercial property cash flow projections. Introduction to three approaches to valuation with emphasis on investing in commercial real estate. In-depth exposure to debt and equity investor returns.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: URB R PL/​A A E/​ECON/​REAL EST  306and (ECON/​FINANCE  300or concurrent enrollment)
